title: Ruschia rupis-arcuatae
taxonomy: Ruschia rupis-arcuatae is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is native to Namibia and is part of the Ruschia genus, which comprises succulent plants. Ruschia rupis-arcuatae is further classified within the family Aizoaceae, which includes other succulent plants. This classification places it within the order Caryophyllales, and the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Ruschia rupis-arcuatae reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
